Clause_Text: Minimum turnover of 100 Cr required for startup bidding.
Legal_Impact: Restricts competition and violates MSME preference policies.
Recommendation: Lower turnover requirement to 5 Cr or provide MSME exemption.

Clause_Text: Bids must be submitted within 3 working days of NIT.
Legal_Impact: Inadequate time for complex technical proposals.
Recommendation: Extend submission window to at least 14 days.

Clause_Text: Mandatory requirement for proprietary 'Brand X' hardware.
Legal_Impact: Restrictive specifications favoring a single vendor.

Clause_Text: ISO 27001:2015 must be held for at least 10 years.
Payment terms set to 180 days post-completion.
Legal_Impact: Creates cash flow issues for small contractors.
Recommendation: Align with standard 30-day GFR payment norms.
